# VIX_MODULES_BEGIN
include(${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/cmake/vix_modules.cmake)
# VIX_MODULES_END


# VIX_MODULE_LINKS_BEGIN
# Auto-generated by: vix modules
# NOTE: This links modules into the main target named like project(<name>).
#       If your main target differs, remove this section and link targets manually.
# VIX_MODULE_LINK_BEGIN requests
if (TARGET myproj::requests)
  if (TARGET myproj)
    target_link_libraries(myproj PRIVATE myproj::requests)
  endif()
endif()
# VIX_MODULE_LINK_END requests
# VIX_MODULE_LINKS_END
